refnamediv.refpurpose: Removes an isolated edge and returns description of action. If the edge is not isolated, then an exception is thrown.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Removes an isolated edge and returns description of action. If the edge is not isolated, then an exception is thrown.
&sqlmm_compliant; SQL-MM: Topo-Geo and Topo-Net 3: Routine Details: X+1.3.3

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: -- Remove an isolated node with no face -- SELECT topology.ST_RemoveIsoNode('ma_topo', 7 ) As result; result ------------------------- Isolated node 7 removed
